response: The iPhone 15 Pro is priced at $999 and features a stunning 6.1-inch OLED display. Powered by the advanced A17 Pro chip, it boasts a 48MP main camera and a 3274mAh battery. Available in storage options of 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB, this sleek device weighs 187 grams and has received an impressive rating of 4.6 out of 5.
